summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 94 features: BottomNavBar component (replacing UnifiedFloatingIsland), Hispalostories (24h ephemeral stories CRUD), and Customer Dashboard horizontal tabs. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Minor 404 errors for some images in console (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: BottomNavBar correctly hides on login/register paths (HIDDEN_ON_PATHS array)
BottomNavBar shows different items based on user role (chat only for logged-in, Sales AI for producers, Creative AI for influencers)
Hispalostories APIs correctly handle 24h expiration with expires_at field
StoriesRow integrated in both SocialFeed.js and UserProfilePage.js
CustomerLayoutResponsive uses horizontal tabs instead of bottom nav for dashboard mobile view
seed_data_creation: Test story created and deleted during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 94 features verified working: 1) BottomNavBar replaces UnifiedFloatingIsland with role-based items (Chat, Hispalo AI, + Post, Sales AI/Creative AI, Profile), 2) Hispalostories CRUD APIs working (POST/GET/DELETE /api/stories), 3) Customer dashboard uses horizontal tabs at top on mobile instead of bottom nav. Stories row shows on homepage feed and user profile page.

features_verified.hispalo_ai_button: PASS - data-testid='bottom-nav-ai' found and opens AI assistant
features_verified.sales_ai_for_producer: PASS - data-testid='bottom-nav-sales' found for producer role
features_verified.sales_ai_panel_opens: PASS - data-testid='sales-ai-panel' opens with Sales AI assistant
features_verified.customer_dashboard_horizontal_tabs: PASS - 6/6 mobile tabs found (Inicio, Pedidos, Tiendas, Perfil, AI, Predict)
features_verified.stories_row_on_homepage: PASS - data-testid='stories-row' found in social feed
features_verified.stories_row_on_profile: PASS - StoriesRow and add-story-btn found on user profile
features_verified.hispalostories_api_create: PASS - POST /api/stories creates story with image
